goal: Conduct a rigorous forensic audit of the v10 microstructure overlay result to confirm, downgrade, or reject it as a genuine improvement over the immutable baseline.
global_constraints: v11 is audit-only: no new features, no new directional scouts, no early-cut, no label changes.
Immutable reference is active-signal-v1@1 — never modify the baseline.
All comparisons must use the same lockbox window for base and overlay.
Short-only, long-only, and combined veto must be tested as separate runs — never aggregated into a single story.
Leakage, reference, window, and snapshot audits must complete before any interpretive conclusion.
Simple rule-based overlay must be validated before model-backed overlay.
PROMOTE status is only valid if v10 survives the entire forensic cycle.

slices.title: Window integrity audit
slices.hypothesis: Verify that train, selection-OOS, and lockbox windows are identical across all v10 runs and that lockbox was never peeked at.
slices.objective: Verify that train, selection-OOS, and lockbox windows are identical across all v10 runs and that lockbox was never peeked at.
success_criteria: Window discipline verdict: valid or invalid with specific violations documented.
evidence_requirements: Window discipline verdict: valid or invalid with specific violations documented.

slices.title: Feature leakage audit
slices.hypothesis: Verify that all micro-features are causally clean with no future information leaking into decision-time features.
slices.objective: Verify that all micro-features are causally clean with no future information leaking into decision-time features.
success_criteria: Per-feature leakage verdict: leakage absent / suspicious / confirmed leakage.
evidence_requirements: Per-feature leakage verdict: leakage absent / suspicious / confirmed leakage.

slices.title: Label leakage and shortcut audit
slices.hypothesis: Check whether veto models achieved suspiciously high AUC because label construction is near-identical to the strongest feature.
slices.objective: Check whether veto models achieved suspiciously high AUC because label construction is near-identical to the strongest feature.
success_criteria: Label verdict: labels valid / labels too shortcut-prone / labels invalid.
evidence_requirements: Label verdict: labels valid / labels too shortcut-prone / labels invalid.
